sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n95318" key="skulmw/dhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">σκυλ-μώδης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ες</itype>, <sense id="n95318.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">troublesome, bringing trouble</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> </bibl> in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(1).171</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
